## Entities.Inventory.IngredientInventoryLibrary.removeForIngredient() method

Removes an inventory entry for a specific ingredient. Searches all collections for the entry with matching ingredientId.

**Signature:**

```typescript
removeForIngredient(ingredientId: IngredientId): Result<IIngredientInventoryEntry>;
```

ingredientId

[IngredientId](./ts-chocolate.ingredientid.md)


</td><td>

The composite IngredientId of the ingredient whose inventory to remove


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Result&lt;[IIngredientInventoryEntry](./ts-chocolate.entities.inventory.iingredientinventoryentry.md)<!-- -->&gt;

Success with the removed entry, or Failure if not found or remove fails
